name: Short Video Replicator
description: Analyze and replicate viral short videos with one click: auto-download, transcribe, 3-dimension breakdown, and AI-powered rewrite. Supports TikTok, Bilibili, and YouTube.
headline: Analyze and replicate viral short videos from TikTok, Bilibili, and YouTube
author: xiaolu7586
suggested_prompts: Analyze this TikTok video and break down why it went viral
Download and transcribe this Bilibili video
Rewrite this video script with a different angle
Find trending video formats I can replicate

fields.label: Video Transcript API Key
fields.description: API key for Bilibili/YouTube transcript service (no video download needed). Supports BibiGPT (https://bibigpt.co/user/integration) or any compatible provider.

fields.label: Video Transcript API Base URL
fields.description: API endpoint base URL. Leave blank to use BibiGPT (default). Fill in if using a compatible third-party service.
